rationale: In Study 2, the authors explicitly state that their four-item self-image threat measure is adapted from Mende et al. (2019). Self-image threat is the focal mechanism in the paper and is used across mediation analyses and later studies, so this citation plays a meaningful methodological role rather than a passing mention. The citing paper does not directly extend or challenge the robot-context theory; it primarily reuses an approach from that work.
relation_description: The citing paper adapts and uses Mende et al. (2019)'s self-image threat measurement to operationalize its core mediator in the VFR context. This is a transfer of a prior measurement approach to a new domain.
